task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the payload integration brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/payload_integration_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured the required ArduPilot parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'Parameters' setup screen showing searches or modifications for SCR_ENABLE, SCR_HEAP_SIZE, SERIAL4_PROTOCOL, SERIAL4_BAUD, LOG_DISARMED, or BRD_BOOT_DELAY.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent added Takeoff and DO_CHANGE_SPEED commands to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'Plan' view showing a mission list containing a 'Takeoff' item and a 'Change Speed' (or DO_CHANGE_SPEED) item configured to 1.0 m/s.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent added a high-altitude Waypoint and an RTL command to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'Plan' view showing a 'Waypoint' item with an altitude of at least 140m (typically 150m) and a 'Return To Launch' (RTL) item at the end of the mission list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the completed mission plan to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A QGroundControl 'File Save' dialog or a file manager/terminal showing the mission being saved as 'vertical_profile.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters and create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface (Vehicle Setup, Plan View) rather than manually writing a .plan JSON file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the parameter tree or used the parameter search bar in QGC.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGC parameter search bar or category list should be visible and actively used to find the specific serial, scripting, and logging parameters.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just copy-paste a pre-made mission file from an external source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show the step-by-step addition of mission items (Takeoff, Change Speed, Waypoint, RTL) in the QGC Plan view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The payload integration brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/payload_integration_brief.txt. The 6 required parameters to configure in QGC are: SCR_ENABLE=1, SCR_HEAP_SIZE=81920, SERIAL4_PROTOCOL=28, SERIAL4_BAUD=115, LOG_DISARMED=1, and BRD_BOOT_DELAY=3000. The mission must contain a Takeoff, a DO_CHANGE_SPEED command set to 1.0 m/s, a Waypoint with an altitude of at least 140.0 m (target is 150m), and an RTL command. The final mission plan must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/vertical_profile.plan.
